symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.15 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`25 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`P/N 3669-X`) and flushed separator bowl (`557 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.13 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge (`0.12 inch` thick) clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve (`P/N 7176-A`), cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Compressor contactor chatting rapidly (`22 Hz`). Hermetic dome temperature normal but unit drawing `50 Amps` (`target 93 Amps`). High load demand from driven equipment (COMP-201) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Liquid slugging (`81%` liquid refrigerant return) destroyed scroll compressor involute plates during abrupt hot gas bypass failure.
action_taken: Cut out failed compressor shell, flushed system of acidic burnout oil (`P/N 9029-A` solvent), installed suction filter drier, brazed new scroll (`Spec-698`), and charged (`122 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Core, Burnout Cleanup Filter, RX-11 Flush Solvent (1 Can), R-407C (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded to `116`°C (`normal < 3°C`). Discharge line frost (`0.18 inch` buildup) indicating starved evaporator coil.
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines (`0.24 inch` worn away) inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over `1 years`.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps (`Spec-748`), pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification (`13 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Megger test of compressor windings shows dead short to ground (`0.18 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance). Distinct heavy electrical burn smell from terminal box. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to COMP-201.
root_cause: Mechanical seizure (`272 in-lbs` lockup) of hermetic scroll/reciprocating compressor internal bearings due to prolonged loss of oil return (`56%` oil loss) from system.
action_taken: Replaced start and run capacitors (`P/N 1565-A`) along with potential relay; tested hermetic compressor windings (`0.16 Mega-ohms OK`) and successfully restarted unit.
parts_used: Compressor Run Capacitor 45uF, Start Relay Kit, Contactor

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `86`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI (`target 19 PSI`).
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`P/N 1988-REV2`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-20%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`Spec-616`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`141 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `127`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI (`target 53 PSI`).
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines (`0.13 inch` worn away) inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over `4 years`.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps (`Spec-225`), pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification (`40 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy liquid water spray (`353 GPM`) when blowing down downstream pneumatic regulator bowls. Dryer separator drain stuck closed.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`38 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`P/N 5590-REV2`) and flushed separator bowl (`245 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `85`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI (`target 47 PSI`).
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines (`0.14 inch` worn away) inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over `8 months`.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps (`Spec-100`), pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification (`149 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Compressed air dew point reading normal (`108`°C) but downstream coalescing filters rapidly flooding with liquid condensate (`50%` saturation).
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`480V` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`Spec-992`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`38 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Compressor contactor chatting rapidly (`47 Hz`). Hermetic dome temperature normal but unit drawing `63 Amps` (`target 109 Amps`).
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell (`3.3 lbs`) causing complete loss of pumping capacity (`15.7 PSI` differential).
action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (`Spec-234` capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`68 Amps`).
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

symptom_description: Hot gas bypass valve fully open (`60%`) but dew point remains high (`111`°C). Leak detection dye visible near condenser return bend.
root_cause: Thermal expansion stress fractured condenser coil U-bend brazed joint (`0.012 gap` crack) due to blocked cooling fan (`137`°C).
action_taken: Brazed fractured condenser U-bend (`Spec-209`), pressure tested with nitrogen (`43 PSI`), evacuated to 300 microns, and weighed in `55 lbs` of R-134a.
parts_used: Condenser U-Bend Fitting, Nitrogen Test Gas (1 Cyl), R-134a (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy liquid water spray (`276 GPM`) when blowing down downstream pneumatic regulator bowls. Dryer separator drain stuck closed. Inspected power and control interconnects running to COMP-201 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`39 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`Spec-520`) and flushed separator bowl (`604 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Loud high humming and `144` Amps locked rotor current (`LRA`) when compressor attempts to start. Main breaker trips after 3 seconds.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip (`13%` drop on `480V +/- 3%` feed) damaged hermetic compressor start winding over `24109` hours.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly (`P/N 2812-REV2`), installed new suction/liquid line filter driers (`Spec-549`), pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system (`15 lbs`).
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor Unit, Liquid Line Drier, R-407C Refrigerant (8 lbs)

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.12 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal (`23%` torn) preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles (`52 Hz`).
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned moisture separator sump, installed new drain solenoid valve rebuild kit (`P/N 1426-A`), and verified timed discharge cycles (`43 Hz`).
parts_used: Automatic Drain Rebuild Kit, Separator Bowl Gasket

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 26 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl.
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`480V` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`Spec-108`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`81 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring
